The Plant Ridge & Valley Natives campaign includes the following 11 counties (from north to south): Frederick, Clarke, Warren, Shenandoah, Page, Rockingham, Augusta, Highland, Bath, Rockbridge, and Alleghany. We also include the cities of Winchester, Harrisonburg, Staunton, Waynesboro, Lexington, Buena Vista, and Covington.

In May 2023, we published the first edition of Plant Ridge & Valley Natives: A Gardeners Guide to Virginias Ridge & Valley Native Plants. This full-color, spiral-bound book contains 144 pages of beautiful native plants suitable to using in a home garden or commercial landscape to provide not only beauty, but also high ecological value for our local ecosystems. The Guide includes six garden designs created specifically for us by ecologist Iara Lacher and garden designer Anne Elise Lintelman.

A second and expanded edition has recently been published. Enlarged to 172 pages, the revised Guide includes an index and glossary, as well as plant lists for gardening challenges such as deer, black walnut, and drought. We have added to the species lists of wildflowers, shrubs, trees, and vines.

Item Name: Container Gardening with Native Plants Workshop
Description:
Join us for a fun hands-on workshop where you will learn the art of container gardening with native plants! During this workshop participants will receive a 14" clay terracotta pot and three beautiful native plants that they can talk home after the event!

This session provides an expert lesson covering every stage of the process, including: 
- Plant Selection: Identifying the best species for your specific environment. 
- Design: Arranging colors and textures for maximum visual impact. 
- Planting & Care: Proper techniques to ensure your new arrangement thrives long-term.

Please note that this event is capped at 20 participants to ensure an intimate, high-quality learning experience. We can't wait to see what you create!

Logistics: Because you will be taking home a large terracotta pot and several plants, please ensure you bring an appropriate vehicle to safely transport your new arrangement after the workshop.
